subcodes.first_line: God, blessed and exalted be He, hath revealed unto certain of His Prophets in some of His revelation: "By My might and My majesty..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اوحی الله تبارک و تعالی الی بعض انبیائه فی بعض وحیه و عزتی و جلالی
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
